title: Leashable Collars (Unofficial Port)
description: Collars, clickers, and leashing. What could go wrong?—A port of the Leashable Collars mod by jlortiz0
body:
This is a an Unofficial Port of [jlortiz0](https://modrinth.com/user/jlortiz0)'s [Leashable Collars](https://modrinth.com/mod/leashable-collars) mod that aims to bring the latest features of this mod to more versions.

## Items
- Collars
  - Dyeable.
- Clickers
  - Dyeable.
  - Forces "Owned" Players to Look at You.
- Deed if Ownership
- Paw Patroller
  - Configures "Owned" players holdable/interactable blocks/items with Paws.
- Golden Spatula
  - Allows Removal of Equipment with Curse of Binding.
- Paws
  - Makes it difficult to hold items or interact with blocks.
- Foot Paws
  - Forces wearer to crawl.
- Dog Bed
  - Bed for "Owned" Players.
- Dog Bowl
  - Can Contain Milk or Stack of any Food item.
  - Right-Click to Consume, Shift+Right-Click to take items.
- Invisible Fence
  - Toggleable.
  - Prevents "Owned" players from passing through.
